included.description: Independent BP fuel station and convenience store on IL-146 at I-24 Exit 16 in Vienna, IL. Sells diesel and has a large gravel lot used by truckers, with paid truck parking (about $10, reimbursed with an in-store purchase per driver reports on Trucker Path).
Budget hotel on IL-146 immediately off I-24 Exit 16 in Vienna, IL, with free self parking explicitly including RV, bus, and truck parking. Offers free WiFi, continental breakfast, and an indoor pool.

held.hold_reason: Real repair shop at 35 Industrial Dr near I-24 Exit 16 (tires, towing, roadside assistance), but sources (Yelp, AAA, Bumper to Bumper) describe passenger-vehicle service; no corroboration that it services commercial/semi trucks. M-F daytime hours only.

excluded.reason: Real 24/7 heavy-duty towing/truck repair facility (6685 US Hwy 45 N, Vienna), but its own site places it 4.5 miles north of I-24 on US-45 - outside the at-exit corridor scope per segment rules.
Only rest area on I-24 in Illinois; located at mile marker 37 near Metropolis - outside this segment's mile 0-20 range (belongs to the eastern segment).

excluded.business_name: Illinois weigh stations near I-24/I-57 junction (Marion NB/SB)
excluded.reason: No weigh station exists on I-24 within mile 0-20 in Illinois; the nearby scales are on I-57 at ~MM 47 near Marion, north of the I-24 junction - a different interstate outside this corridor.

excluded.business_name: Big Bay / New Columbia exit businesses
excluded.reason: Candidate list placed Big Bay/New Columbia at exit 16, but iExit shows this interchange is actually Exit 27 - beyond the mile 20 cutoff for this segment.

In-town convenience store with diesel roughly 2 miles from I-24 via US-45/IL-146; no source documents truck parking, truck lanes, or other truck amenities, and it is not on Casey's designated truck-stop list.
Small-town gas station about 3 miles from I-24 Exit 7 in downtown Goreville; no evidence of truck amenities and not at the exit.
